name: Dr. Rohan Das
bio: Dr. Rohan Das runs the Autonomous Perception Lab focusing on visual SLAM and sensor fusion for robotic navigation in GPS-denied environments. His group developed a lightweight monocular SLAM system that runs on embedded hardware for drone navigation in underground mines. He has published extensively on loop closure detection using learned visual descriptors and real-time 3D reconstruction from RGB-D streams. His lab maintains an indoor autonomous drone testbed and collaborates with DRDO on perception for defense robotics.
